name: controlled_first_20_strict
description: Recommended profile for supervised first-20 live: enforcement on; fail-closed on missing joint, stale joint, unknown mode, degraded integrity; caution blocks entries; tighter stale window than default.

rationale.GOVERNANCE_ORDER_ENFORCEMENT: Without true, gate is advisory-only and will not block orders on joint state.
rationale.GOVERNANCE_CAUTION_BLOCK_ENTRIES: Maps joint live_mode caution to block when enforcement is on.
rationale.GOVERNANCE_MISSING_JOINT_BLOCKS: Fail closed if joint artifact empty/missing when enforcement on.
rationale.GOVERNANCE_STALE_JOINT_BLOCKS: Fail closed if joint older than GOVERNANCE_JOINT_STALE_HOURS when enforcement on.
rationale.GOVERNANCE_UNKNOWN_MODE_BLOCKS: Fail closed if live_mode is unknown when enforcement on.
rationale.GOVERNANCE_DEGRADED_INTEGRITY_BLOCKS: Fail closed if review_integrity_state is not full when enforcement on.
rationale.GOVERNANCE_JOINT_STALE_HOURS: Default in code is 168; 48h is stricter for controlled live — adjust per operational cadence.

warning: If joint_review_latest is not maintained by the review pipeline, strict missing/stale blocks will halt entries — ensure organism pipeline is healthy before enabling.
